{{Quote|Bantha poodoo.|Kraid Nemmeso taunting other Podracer pilots in Huttese|<ref name="RR" />}}
The '''Ghishi''' were a [[Species/Legends|race]] of warrior-mantids from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Ghishi|same name]]. Ghishi were thin and lanky, with long insectile limbs and large [[Color/Legends|orange]] eyes. [[Kraid Nemmeso]] was a Ghishi who became well-known on the [[Podracing/Legends|podracing]] circuit during the final [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].
